scripts.sync:data: cp data/questions.json data/copy_pack.json data/archetype_prototypes.json cloudfunctions/calculateReport/data/ && cp data/questions.json data/copy_pack.json public/data/
scripts.deploy: npm run sync:data && echo y | tcb fn deploy calculateReport --dir cloudfunctions/calculateReport -e cloud1-3ghh3b2jd73d087e --force && tcb hosting deploy public / -e cloud1-3ghh3b2jd73d087e
